recommendations.title: Airplane!
recommendations.overview: An ex-fighter pilot forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.
recommendations.director: David Zucker, Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams

recommendations.director: Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams, David Zucker

recommendations.director: Jim Abrahams, Jerry Zucker, David Zucker

recommendations.title: Kajaki
recommendations.overview: British soldiers guarding the Kajaki Dam set out to rescue a three-man team after one of them loses a leg to a landmine.

recommendations.title: The Marksman
recommendations.overview: When Chechen rebels take over a Russian nuclear reactor, it’s up to a special ops marksman to rescue the hostages and prevent nuclear catastrophe.
